'''Corfai''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==History==
Corfai was colonized by [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sleeper ship/Legends|sleeper ships]] sometime after [[27,500 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" />

Home to one of the oldest civilizations in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], the planet was a center for trade and commerce dating back generations prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

It was the site of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] supply bunker. During the [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] crisis, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] ambushed a [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic fleet]] assembling off Corfai.

It was occupied by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Rakata Empire]] map of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places Corfai right next to Corellia, but the appendix and the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] map put the planet in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas Online Companion'']] confirmed the first placement.
